About.heading: More than just
About.subtitle: Discover who I am, what I master, and where I come from.

bio.title: The human behind the code
bio.p1: Passionate about computer science since a young age, I've always sought to understand how things work behind the screen.
bio.p2: Today, I don't just understand — I build. As a 3rd-year Computer Science student (Data track) at IUT Créteil-Vitry, I combine academic rigor with real-world challenges at Linedata, where I work as an apprentice Support Analyst.
bio.p3: My goal? Join a master's program in computer science to deepen my skills in development, data and artificial intelligence, and ultimately build solutions that combine technical rigor with real business impact.

t1.desc: Analysis and resolution of technical incidents on financial software (credit, leasing). Feature development in Java, SQL, PL/SQL, Angular. Unix/Oracle infrastructure work.

t2.desc: Centralized database design with automated migration. API integration with external platforms. Real-time dashboard and automated reports.

t3.desc: Data administration, management and engineering. Projects in AI, web development and data engineering.
